title: mayepea domingensis
intro: Mayepea domingensis, also known as Guettarda domingensis, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in the Caribbean region. Traditionally, Mayepea domingensis has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties. The plant's extracts have shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its numerous health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Mayepea domingensis is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can be used to make tea, while its roots are used to create tinctures or ointments.
